violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -2 containers stored uncovered in upright freezer at fryers. -Open bag of chicken wings and a bag of beef patties left exposed in walk in freezer. *Corrected on-site.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Server sani bucket found with 500ppm Quat solution. *Sani Bucket should be maintained at 200-400ppm Quat solution.

Cooling of potentially hazardous food. — --Cooked potentially hazardous food was not cooled properly from 70F to 41F or below within four hours. -Potato soup in walk-in cooler dated 1/14 found with temperature of 40-44F. *Disposed of immediately.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Broken handle at white microwave. -Worn/damaged gasket and door to walk in freezer.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Minimal debris at can opener. -Heavy residue at both cook line waffle makers. -Frost build up at interior shelves of fryer freezer. -Residue/debris at slicer.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Frost build up/food spill at shelves in upright pie freezer. -Residue/splatter at side of white microwave. -Moisture/debris below hot hold table cutting board. -Some moisture below cutting board at make table. -Liquid/spill in container in cabinet below ice bin at buffet line area. *Corrected on-site removed to dish pit immediately.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Cracking caulking at hand sink back splash. -High Dust as half wall behind salad prep table. -Dust/debris at ceiling lights and vents, heavy build up at ceiling vent near kitchen entrance. -Grease/residue at lights at cook line. -Ice/frost build up below fans of walk in freezer. -Dust at walk in cooler fans.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Employee apron, vape and lighter stored on top of left microwave. -Partially eaten employee meal sitting below heat lamp at cook line. -Keys and lighter on cookline shelf above heat lamp shelf.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
